Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Use an approach similar to the example given in the instructions Choose appropriate activity labels from the description Ensure that your first model demonstrates where unfairness could appear XOR branch Ensure that your second model removes that potential source of bias No XOR branch Code must be valid Python using pm4py
